destinations.evidence: The node crate enables async-context by default and propagates that feature to the EVM dependencies.
The factory wraps the supplied DB/env in an async-aware context and installs Ritual precompiles for the created EVM.
The default async context used by the nodebuilder factory is ExecutionMode::Building.
destinations.snippet:
impl Default for ExecutionMode { fn default() -> Self { Self::Building } }

impl Default for AsyncCommitmentutionContext { fn default() -> Self { Self { execution_mode: ExecutionMode::default(), ... } } }

equivalence_argument: The nodebuilder repo owns RitualEvmFactory in the v2.2.0 architecture. Although it uses AsyncCommitmentutionContext::default rather than an explicit with_mode call, the dependency context default is ExecutionMode::Building, preserving the required building-mode async context with the supplied DB/env and Ritual precompiles.
notes: Mapped in dependency because RitualEvmFactory lives in ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal.
rationale: The commit subject says the EVM factory is fixed to initialize with the new async context, the Cargo diff enables async-context by default and on alloy-evm, and the factory explicitly creates AsyncExecutionContext::with_mode(ExecutionMode::Building) before building the mainnet EVM with RitualPrecompiles. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: With the node crate's default features, RitualEvmFactory::create_evm must construct an EVM whose execution context is AsyncExecutionContext in ExecutionMode::Building while preserving the supplied DB, cfg env, block env, NoOpInspector, and Ritual precompiles.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build the node crate with default features, instantiate RitualEvmFactory with a test DB and EvmEnv, execute or inspect a transaction/precompile path that requires AsyncExecutionContext, and assert it observes ExecutionMode::Building rather than a missing/default non-async context; also assert Ritual precompiles remain installed.
summary: Nodebuilder creates Ritual EVMs with a default building-mode async context.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Instantiate RitualEvmFactory with default features and assert the context reports ExecutionMode::Building while Ritual precompiles are installed.
title: Node EVM uses async building context
